message:
feat(web): add prompt rating system components

Introduces a ratings feature for user feedback on content:

components/ratings/:
- RatingButton.tsx: Interactive thumb up/down buttons with animation
- RatingDisplay.tsx: Shows aggregate rating summary (likes, dislikes, ratio)
- RatingButton.test.tsx: Component unit tests
- index.ts: Module exports

hooks/use-rating.ts:
- useRating hook for rating state management
- Supports multiple content types (prompt, bundle, workflow, collection, skill)
- Local user ID tracking for anonymous ratings
- Optimistic updates with error rollback
- API integration for persisting ratings

This enables users to rate prompts and other content types,
providing valuable feedback signals for discovery and quality.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
